creator: pirzyk@FreeBSD.org
text:
Need to change the MAINTAINER email address in the Makefile, as the =
old address is no longer available to the maintainer.

Fix: 

--- ./devel/p5-Config-Objective/Makefile.orig     2008-04-17 =
10:24:58.000000000 -0400
+++ ./devel/p5-Config-Objective/Makefile     2011-03-15 =
09:25:42.000000000 -0400
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:    Config-Objective
 # Date created:                         Mon Feb 16 15:50:34 CST 2004
-# Whom:                                 Jim Pirzyk <pirzyk@uiuc.edu>
+# Whom:                                 Jim Pirzyk <pirzyk@freebsd.org>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/devel/p5-Config-Objective/Makefile,v 1.6 2008/04/17 =
14:24:58 araujo Exp $
 #
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 MASTER_SITES=3D CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=3D     p5-

-MAINTAINER=3D   pirzyk@uiuc.edu
+MAINTAINER=3D   pirzyk@freebsd.org
 COMMENT=3D Configuration data as perl objects

 BUILD_DEPENDS=3D     =
${SITE_PERL}/Parse/Yapp.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Parse-Yapp \
